summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Suite Essentials lead generation website. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend loads properly with all sections, navigation works across all pages, contact form integration successful with MongoDB storage.

design_issues.issue: Form validation error message not displayed when submitting empty form

passed_tests: Backend API POST /api/inquiries creates inquiry in MongoDB
Backend API GET /api/inquiries returns list of inquiries
Backend API handles invalid requests with proper 422 status
Homepage loads with hero, stats, bento grid, why choose us, CTA sections
Navigation between all 4 pages (Home, Products, About, Contact) works
Products page displays all 7 categories with subcategories
Quick category navigation links work with anchor scroll
Contact form submission works - creates inquiry in backend
Contact form category toggle selection works
Thank you message appears after successful form submission
Phone and email contact info displayed correctly across pages
Footer links navigate to correct pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issue: Contact form validation error message not showing when required fields are empty. Form still validates correctly on backend but user feedback could be improved.
